scripts.deploy: sf project deploy start --source-dir force-app --target-org dev-org
scripts.deploy:validate: sf project deploy start --source-dir force-app --target-org dev-org --dry-run --test-level RunLocalTests --wait 30
scripts.deploy:manifest: sf project deploy start --manifest manifest/package.xml --target-org dev-org --wait 30
scripts.retrieve: sf project retrieve start --source-dir force-app --target-org dev-org
scripts.test:apex: sf apex run test --target-org dev-org --test-level RunLocalTests --code-coverage --result-format human --wait 20
scripts.test:apex:all: sf apex run test --target-org dev-org --test-level RunAllTestsInOrg --code-coverage --result-format human --wait 30
